jira.reference_jql: filter=12345 AND resolution = Done AND cf[10028] IS NOT EMPTY AND updated >= -180d ORDER BY updated DESC
jira.backlog_jql: filter=12345 AND statusCategory != Done AND cf[10028] IS EMPTY AND issuetype IN (Story, Bug, Task) ORDER BY created DESC
